toasts.memoryFull: Coach memory is getting full — review it in Settings.
toasts.hrAdded_one: Heart rate added to your run ❤
toasts.contributionVerified_one: Your race contribution was verified — thanks! 🎉
toasts.contributionVerified_other: {{count}} of your race contributions were verified — thanks! 🎉
toasts.foundRun: Found a run from your watch — {{km}} km on {{date}}

consent.title: Help improve the app?
consent.body: We'd like to collect limited usage analytics and crash reports to fix bugs and see what's used. No run data, routes, notes, or heart rate, or coach messages are ever sent. You can change this any time in Settings → Privacy.

crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.body: The app hit an unexpected error. Reloading usually fixes it — your runs and plan are saved.

update.requiredBody: This version of Running Coach is no longer supported. Please update to the latest version to keep using the app.
update.available: A new version of Running Coach is available.
